channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: AI wrote the docs — humans wrote the gaps
item.description: Cut API edge-case incidents 67% with a 300-line human file — the one place AI can’t fill. Includes Node 20 LTS and Python 3.11 examples and CI checks.

item.title: 5 ways to find hidden latency before production
item.description: Cut hidden latency detection time 92%: 5 observability pipelines with concrete numbers, versioned tools, and real postmortems from 2026 production incidents.

item.title: Build a serverless backend in Africa with PocketBase
item.description: Deploy a serverless backend in Africa with PocketBase — 180 ms p95 latency, $1.87/month, and zero auth boilerplate. Real deployments in Lagos, Nairobi, and Cape Town.

item.title: Go MCP servers: benchmarks & scaling traps
item.description: Cut MCP server latency 80% with Go: binary JSON, atomic tool registry, and fixed-size pools. Benchmarks, traps, and the 30-minute fix.

item.title: RAG on legacy systems: vector DB vs. full-text SQL
item.description: Cut RAG hosting cost 78% with PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector 0.7 vs Weaviate 1.22. Real latency and cost data from a 12-month enterprise rollout.

item.title: Redefining engineering principles in the AI era
item.description: Cut bug escape rate 12% by auditing AI-generated code — prompt contracts, runtime guards, and decision logs that actually work in 2026.

item.title: AI pair coding killed pull request reviews
item.description: Cut PR merge time 61% by redefining AI’s role in reviews — the tooling, weights, and ownership rules that actually worked in 2026.

item.title: Freelance rates 2026: AI killed the hourly rate
item.description: Freelance rates fell 22% for juniors in 2026 while top contractors charge €120–€180/hour for AI-assisted architecture. See the real pricing shifts, tools, and prompts that changed everything.

item.title: Zero-downtime migrations: dual writes are dangerous
item.description: Zero-downtime migrations: dual writes fail 40% of the time — connection leaks, write skew, and rollback traps cost teams $120k+ in refunds. Backfill jobs and CDC reduce failure rates to 0.01%.

item.title: Block 2026’s worst API attacks
item.description: Cut API security threats 90% with AWS WAF and JWT — common attacks, implementation details, and results

item.title: Double the price, double the revenue
item.description: Raise dev tool MRR 15% in 7 days with four pricing tiers, Redis usage counters, and a $5/month infra bill — real data from 8k users in 2026

item.title: 3 skills to outrun AI salary cuts
item.description: Protect your 2026 salary against AI automation with 3 boring engineering skills — connection pooling, circuit breakers, and CDN cache control — proven to cut outages 90% and keep clients paying premium rates.

item.title: Offline apps: cache first, sync later
item.description: Cut offline session failure 36% with SQLite cache and pull-then-push sync — conflict resolution, battery cost, and the clinic test that changed our approach.

item.title: Killed a $3k/month K8s cluster for $200/month
item.description: Cut infrastructure cost 93% by replacing a $3k/month Kubernetes cluster with Fly.io for $288/month — actual latency, egress, and deploy metrics from a 12k MAU SaaS.

item.title: Least-privilege AWS IAM in a day
item.description: Cut AWS IAM policy review time from hours to minutes with AWS Policy Generator, IAM Access Analyzer, and condition keys — 5-minute workflow with 12% attack surface reduction proven in 2026

item.title: Meet 2026 SBOM reality: no more hand-rolled scripts
item.description: Cut SBOM generation time 95% with Syft 1.13 — multi-stage, SPDX 2.3, and Grype policies that actually block CVEs

item.title: AI scans your code: real risks and defenses
item.description: Cut false positives 60% with AI scan tuning — GitHub Advanced Security vs Snyk Code benchmarks, confidence thresholds, and the one SARIF trick that saves 34% fix time.

item.title: Test AI code, not the AI
item.description: 7 ways to test AI-generated code without testing the AI itself — save 10+ hours/week on brittle tests and catch 68% more bugs with contract checks, golden snapshots, and shadow mode

item.title: AI UI tools: promise vs. production
item.description: Cut component build time 60% with AI UI tools — but watch bundle bloat, design drift, and missing a11y. Cursor 0.32, size-limit 5.0.1, axe-core 4.9 benchmarks inside.

item.title: 2026 AI stack: solo SaaS cost showdown
item.description: Last quarter I shipped two identical micro-SaaSes: one where I outsourced 80% of the backend to an AI agent (using a custom prompt chain on AWS Bedrock)…
